Smile Now, Pay Later

A world-class smile shouldn't wait.

Flexible financing and monthly payment plans make life-changing dentistry accessible — so you can begin today and pay over time.

01 — The Promise

Transformation, within reach.

Plans from $0 down

Begin your transformation today with low monthly payments tailored to your budget — no large upfront cost.

Apply in minutes

A simple, soft credit check gets you an answer fast — without affecting your score or interrupting your day.

Care that fits your life

Stretch your investment across comfortable terms so the smile you deserve never has to wait for the perfect moment.

02 — Our Partners

Trusted financing partners.

We work with the most respected names in healthcare financing. Apply with any of them in minutes — most use a soft credit check that won't affect your score.

Most widely accepted

CareCredit

The healthcare credit card accepted at practices nationwide, with special promotional financing on qualifying treatment.

Apply with CareCredit→
For elective care

Alphaeon Credit

A dedicated credit card for cosmetic and elective care, offering flexible monthly plans and promotional offers.

Apply with Alphaeon Credit→
Fast, soft-check approval

Cherry

Paperless approval in minutes with a soft credit check and flexible monthly payments — many patients qualify for 0% APR.

Apply with Cherry→
For larger plans

Proceed Finance

Built for comprehensive and full-mouth cases, with longer terms and higher approval amounts than standard cards.

Apply with Proceed Finance→

Not sure which fits? Dr. Trev's team will match you to the right plan during your consultation.

03 — Questions

The details, answered.

Will checking my options affect my credit?

No. Pre-qualification uses a soft credit check that has no impact on your credit score. You'll see your options before committing to anything.

What financing partners do you work with?

We partner with CareCredit, Alphaeon, Cherry, and Proceed Finance — leading healthcare lenders offering plans with low and no-interest promotional periods. During your consultation we'll match you to the right fit.

Can I combine financing with insurance?

Yes. Where applicable, we apply your benefits first and finance the remaining balance — so you only ever pay over time for what's left.

How long are the payment terms?

Terms range from a few months to several years depending on the plan and treatment. We'll walk you through options that keep your monthly payment comfortable.

Let's find a plan that fits your life.

Explore Financing Options
